query: SELECT id, whatsappId, name, phone, address, totalOrders, totalSpent, birthDate, createdAt FROM customers WHERE phone LIKE '%17988112791%' OR phone LIKE '%88112791%' OR whatsappId LIKE '%17988112791%' OR whatsappId LIKE '%lid%' ORDER BY id;
